keynotes.text: A SYNOPTIC KEY OF THE MATERIA MEDICA By Cyrus Maxwell BOGER Presented by Médi-T REPERTORY TIME Time, periodically , in general, agg. : Aran., Ars., Cact., Ced., Chin-s., Chin., Eup-p., Gels., Hep., Ip., Kali-c., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pul., Rhus-t., Sul. Time, periodically, daily, agg. : Aran., Ars., Caps., Ip., Nux-v., Pul. Time, periodically, at same hour, agg. : Ant-c., Aran., Ars., Bov., Ced., Chin-s., Cina., Ign., Lyc., Nat-m., Saba. Time, periodically, alternate days, on, agg. : Ars., Canth., Chin., Ip., Lyc., Nat-m., Nux-v., Pul., Rhus-t. Time, periodically, every 4th. day, agg. : Ars., Lyc., Pul., Saba. Time, periodically, every 10th. day, agg. : Lach., Pho. Time, periodically, weekly, agg. : Ars., Canth., Chin., Gels., Iris., Lac-d., Lyc., Pho., Sang., Sil., Sul. Time, periodically, fourteen days, agg. : Ars., Con., Lach., Nic., Sang., Sul. Time, periodically, every 3rd. week, agg. : Aur., Mag-c. Time, periodically, every 4th. week, agg. : Nux-v., Sep. Time, periodically, every 6th. week, agg. : Mag-m. Time, periodically, yearly, agg. : Am-c., Ars., Crot-h., Echi., Elaps., Lach., Lyc., Naj., Nat-n., Rhus-t., Tarn., Thu.
